goal: Restore desktop M1/FE v6 e2e verification in a real localhost/headless Chrome environment. The broad completion audit found Python test directories passing but desktop e2e failing after sandbox restrictions were removed: M1 happy path times out waiting for the project creation screen after clicking /projects/new. Fix the UI/router/e2e surface without changing product scope or backend behavior, and preserve FE v6 mockup alignment.
head: ac34a7e
blocked_scope: Changing M6-RC decision or real adapter evidence policy
Weakening FE v6 route-contract e2e assertions
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may repair desktop UI routing/e2e support, update focused e2e evidence, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: M1 desktop e2e passes in real localhost/headless Chrome environment
FE v6 route contract e2e passes
M2 teacher packet preview e2e passes
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate does not change backend behavior.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped desktop e2e route repair gate after broad verification found pnpm e2e failing with real localhost permissions.
phase_notes.audit: Compared apps/desktop/e2e M1, FE v6, and M2 tests against the /projects/new UI. Found the tests wait for the canonical text Create route contract project while createProjectPage rendered Route contract project, causing the real-browser M1 happy path timeout after navigation.
phase_notes.build: Updated apps/desktop/src/main.mjs so the project wizard title matches the canonical route-contract creation text expected by M1, FE v6, and M2 e2e flows. Added focused review evidence and updated docs/WORKING.md. No backend, schema, training, export, runtime, or M6 evidence policy files changed.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, desktop unit tests, M1 desktop e2e, FE v6 route contract e2e, M2 teacher packet preview e2e, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Desktop e2e route repair is complete. M6-RC remains NOT_GO because real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence is still absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: Desktop UI/e2e repair, focused evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No backend/API/DB/schema/training/export/runtime behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
